mnemonics: D.R.E.A.M. for Deep Reinforcement Learning Synopsis: Define (problem), Review (literature), Experiment (design), Analyze (results), Method (write-up)
keyPoints: Clearly define your research problem and objectives
Conduct a thorough literature review to position your work
Detail your proposed methodology, experiments, and evaluation metrics
commonMistakes: Failing to articulate a clear research gap or contribution
Omitting key related works or state-of-the-art comparisons
Providing insufficient detail on the experimental setup or evaluation plan
